title: Shape of Direct-Method Mass-Metallicity Relation with JWST: Fast-Track Nitrogen and Helium Enrichment
summary: We investigate the mass-metallicity relation (MZR) from z=1 to z=9 using electron-temperature-based gas-phase metallicities and examine how auroral-line selection, star-formation history, and secondary abundances affect its interpretation in the early Universe. We compile a homogeneous sample of 286 star-forming galaxies observed with JWST/NIRSpec medium resolution spectroscopy, selected through detections of the [O\,III]\,$λ$4363 auroral line from the public DAWN JWST Archive (DJA). We derive electron densities, temperatures, and oxygen abundances using the direct $T_e$ method, along with relative N/O and He/H abundances. Stellar masses are obtained via SED fitting and star-formation rates from reddening-corrected Balmer emission lines. To quantify auroral-line selection biases, we additionally stack galaxy spectra with and without auroral-line detections, extending the MZR into regimes inaccessible to individual measurements. The auroral-line-detected sample spans log(M*/Msun)=6.77-10.5 and 12+log(O/H)=6.9-8.4. A linear fit gives an MZR slope of $γ$=0.38 $\pm$ 0.09. Stacked galaxies without individual $λ$4363 detections define a relation with a similar slope but metallicities higher by ~0.2-0.3 dex at fixed stellar mass. Auroral-line detections also show higher SFRs, larger equivalent widths, and larger offsets from the fundamental metallicity relation, whereas non-detections appear more chemically evolved and closer to it. Several stacked bins also show enhanced N/O and He/H ratios. These results indicate that the low-mass high-redshift MZR traced by JWST is shaped by both recent star-formation history and auroral-line selection effects. Auroral lines preferentially identify high-EW, high-sSFR galaxies in the low-metallicity envelope, whereas non-detections reveal a more enriched sequence closer to the metallicity expected from the FMR.

AI.tldr: 本文利用JWST/NIRSpec观测的286个恒星形成星系，通过电子温度法测量金属丰度，研究了红移z=1-9的质量-金属丰度关系（MZR），发现极光发射线探测倾向于选择高恒星形成率、低金属丰度的星系，而未探测到极光线的星系金属丰度更高，更接近基本金属丰度关系（FMR）的预测。
AI.motivation: 探究早期宇宙（z=1-9）中星系的质-金属丰度关系，并量化极光发射线选择效应、恒星形成历史及次级元素丰度如何影响MZR的解释。
AI.method: 从DAWN JWST Archive（DJA）中选取286个探测到[O III]λ4363极光线的星系样本，利用直接Te法推导电子密度、温度及氧、N/O、He/H丰度，通过SED拟合获取恒星质量，用红移校正的巴尔默发射线计算恒星形成率。同时，对有/无极光线探测的星系进行光谱叠加分析，以量化选择偏差。
AI.result: 极光线探测样本覆盖log(M*/Msun)=6.77-10.5和12+log(O/H)=6.9-8.4，MZR线性拟合斜率为γ=0.38±0.09。无极光线探测的叠加星系MZR斜率相近，但金属丰度在固定恒星质量下高约0.2-0.3 dex。极光线探测星系具有更高SFR、更大等效宽度，偏离FMR更远；而非探测星系更接近FMR，部分叠加bin还显示出增强的N/O和He/H比值。
AI.conclusion: JWST揭示的高红移低质量端MZR受近期恒星形成历史与极光发射线选择效应的共同塑造。极光线优先识别高EW、高sSFR的低金属丰度星系，而非探测星系则呈现出更富集的化学演化序列，更接近FMR的预期金属丰度。

recommendation.reason: 论文主题为JWST观测的恒星形成星系质量-金属丰度关系，属于星系化学演化领域。用户兴趣集中在强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学和致密气体，与本文的金属丰度研究仅有宽泛的星系形成领域重叠，缺乏直接关联。无核心作者匹配，方法（电子温度法）与用户常用方法不同。
recommendation.topic_fit: 低：论文研究质量-金属丰度关系，用户兴趣为强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、致密气体等，仅共享'高红移星系'这一宽泛主题，无强引力透镜或动力学内容。
recommendation.method_fit: 低：使用电子温度法测量金属丰度，用户常用方法为引力透镜建模、分子气体观测等，方法不匹配。
recommendation.author_fit: 无：作者列表中无用户核心作者。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 中：利用JWST数据研究高红移MZR有一定新颖性，但与用户兴趣方向不直接相关。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文主题与用户核心兴趣（强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、致密气体）不匹配，属于星系化学演化，非用户优先领域。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用基于电子温度的气相金属丰度，研究了从z=1到z=9的质-金属丰度关系（MZR），并探讨了极光发射线选择、恒星形成历史和次级元素丰度如何影响其在早期宇宙中的解释。我们汇编了一个由286个恒星形成星系组成的均匀样本，这些星系通过JWST/NIRSpec中分辨率光谱观测，并基于公共DAWN JWST档案（DJA）中[O\,III]\,$λ$4363极光发射线的探测进行选择。我们使用直接$T_e$方法推导了电子密度、温度和氧丰度，以及相对N/O和He/H丰度。恒星质量通过SED拟合获得，恒星形成率来自红移校正的巴尔默发射线。为了量化极光发射线选择偏差，我们额外堆叠了有和没有极光发射线探测的星系光谱，将MZR扩展到单个测量无法触及的区域。极光发射线探测样本覆盖log(M*/Msun)=6.77-10.5和12+log(O/H)=6.9-8.4。线性拟合给出的MZR斜率为$γ$=0.38 $\pm$ 0.09。没有单个$λ$4363探测的堆叠星系定义了一个斜率相似但金属丰度在固定恒星质量下高出约0.2-0.3 dex的关系。极光发射线探测还显示出更高的SFR、更大的等效宽度以及与基本金属丰度关系更大的偏移，而非探测星系则表现出更化学演化的状态并更接近该关系。几个堆叠区间还显示出增强的N/O和He/H比值。这些结果表明，JWST揭示的低质量高红移MZR受到近期恒星形成历史和极光发射线选择效应的共同塑造。极光线优先识别低金属丰度包络中高EW、高sSFR的星系，而非探测星系则揭示了一个更富集的序列，其金属丰度更接近FMR的预期值。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，JWST揭示的高红移低质量端MZR受近期恒星形成历史与极光发射线选择效应的共同塑造。极光线优先识别高EW、高sSFR的低金属丰度星系，而非探测星系则呈现出更富集的化学演化序列，更接近FMR的预期金属丰度。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Diagnostic diagrams used to separate AGN from star-forming candidates. In all panels, orange and blue symbols indicate AGN and SF candidates, respectively. Dashed lines show the empirical demarcation criteria of Mazzolari et al. ( 2024 ) . See the text for details.
figures.caption_zh: Figure 1 : 用于区分AGN和恒星形成候选体的诊断图。在所有面板中，橙色和蓝色符号分别表示AGN和恒星形成候选体。虚线显示了Mazzolari等人（2024）的经验划分标准。详见正文。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Diagnostic diagram based on the emission-line ratios \(\log({He2Hb})\) and \(\log({O3H\gamma})\) . Orange points represent AGN candidates, while blue points correspond to star-forming galaxies. The black dashed line shows the empirical demarcation defined by Bonatto et al. ( 2026 ) based on local (z¡1) analogs with DESI.
figures.caption_zh: Figure 2 : 基于发射线比 \(\log({He2Hb})\) 和 \(\log({O3H\gamma})\) 的诊断图。橙色点代表AGN候选体，蓝色点对应恒星形成星系。黑色虚线显示了Bonatto等人（2026）基于DESI本地（z¡1）类似物定义的经验划分。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Comparison between stellar mass estimates from this work and values reported in the literature. Each symbol corresponds to a different survey or study, as indicated in the legend. The dashed red line marks the one-to-one relation. Error bars represent uncertainties in both axes. The inset panel shows the distribution of differences, \(\Delta=(\log M_{\star}^{This\penalty 10000\ Work}-\log M_{\star}^{Lit})\) .
figures.caption_zh: Figure 3 : 本工作的恒星质量估计与文献报道值的比较。每个符号对应不同的巡天或研究，如图例所示。红色虚线标记一对一关系。误差棒表示两个轴的不确定性。插图面板显示了差异的分布，\(\Delta=(\log M_{\star}^{This\penalty 10000\ Work}-\log M_{\star}^{Lit})\) 。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Relation between stellar mass ( \(\log M_{\star}\) ) and star formation rate ( \(\log{SFR}\) ). Orange points with a colorbar represent the measurements obtained in this work, including error bars in both directions. Comparisons with main-sequence relations reported in the literature are shown: Speagle et al. ( 2014 , \(z=5\) ; black dotted) , Calabrò et al. ( 2017 , \(4 , and the fit derived in this study (black solid). Gray dashed lines indicate constant sSFR values. Additional data from Curti et al. ( 2024 , blue squares) and Faisst et al. ( 2025 , green stars) are also included.
figures.caption_zh: Figure 4 : 恒星质量（ \(\log M_{\star}\) ）与恒星形成率（ \(\log{SFR}\) ）之间的关系。带有色标的橙色点表示本工作获得的测量值，包括两个方向的误差棒。与文献报道的主序关系进行了比较：Speagle等人（2014，\(z=5\) ；黑色虚线），Calabrò等人（2017，\(4 ，以及本研究得出的拟合（黑色实线）。灰色虚线表示恒定的sSFR值。还包含了Curti等人（2024，蓝色方块）和Faisst等人（2025，绿色星形）的额外数据。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : Comparison of oxygen abundances derived in this work with values reported in the literature. The main panel shows \(12+\log({O/H})\) from this work versus literature values, with error bars representing measurement uncertainties. Direct-method abundances are shown in blue symbols ( Sanders et al. ( 2025 ); Nakajima et al. ( 2023 ); Morishita et al. ( 2024 ); Chakraborty et al. ( 2025 ) , while strong-line abundances are in orange Stanton et al. ( 2025 ); Curti et al. ( 2024 ); Nakajima et al. ( 2023 ) The dashed red line indicates the 1:1 relation. The inset shows the histogram of differences \(\Delta=(O/H_{This\,Work}-O/H_{lit})\) , highlighting the distribution of residuals.
figures.caption_zh: Figure 5 : 本工作推导的氧丰度与文献报道值的比较。主面板显示了本工作的 \(12+\log({O/H})\) 与文献值，误差棒表示测量不确定性。直接方法丰度用蓝色符号表示（Sanders等人（2025）；Nakajima等人（2023）；Morishita等人（2024）；Chakraborty等人（2025）），而强线丰度用橙色表示（Stanton等人（2025）；Curti等人（2024）；Nakajima等人（2023））。红色虚线表示1:1关系。插图显示了差异 \(\Delta=(O/H_{This\,Work}-O/H_{lit})\) 的直方图，突出了残差的分布。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6 : Difference in oxygen abundances as a function of the T[O II]. The reference curve is computed using a density-dependent T[O II] relation with \(N_{{e}}=300\penalty 10000\ {cm}^{-3}\) . The four \(\Delta\) curves show the difference relative to the reference when using T[O II]derived for \(N_{{e}}=100\penalty 10000\ {cm}^{-3}\) (density-dependent), the Campbell et al. ( 1986 ) , Izotov et al. ( 2006 ) and Cataldi et al. ( 2025b ) prescriptions.
figures.caption_zh: Figure 6 : 氧丰度差异作为T[O II]的函数。参考曲线使用密度依赖的T[O II]关系计算，其中 \(N_{{e}}=300\penalty 10000\ {cm}^{-3}\) 。四条 \(\Delta\) 曲线显示了相对于参考值的差异，分别使用针对 \(N_{{e}}=100\penalty 10000\ {cm}^{-3}\) 推导的T[O II]（密度依赖）、Campbell等人（1986）、Izotov等人（2006）和Cataldi等人（2025b）的公式。

title: Kinematic Stratification in Extremely Red Quasars Revealed by JWST
comment: 17 pages, 12 figures, submitted to OJAp, comments welcome
summary: We analyze the spectra of the central nuclei of extremely red quasars (ERQs) observed as part of the JWST ERS Q3D program. We focus on the complex kinematic structures of the prominent rest-frame optical emission lines. Our modeling allows us to deblend the lines and separate the emission into distinct kinematic components that imply velocity- and density-stratified gas structures on a range of physical scales within the ERQs. Supplementing the JWST data with archival data, we analyze the spectral energy distributions (SEDs) of the ERQs and find they are consistent with a significantly dust-obscured central source with a small amount of relatively-unobscured UV/optical flux that is scattered into our line-of-sight. While the kinematics of the UV and optical emission lines largely agree, the UV lines are dominated by scattered light. In contrast, the optical emission-line ratios indicate a combination of scattered and obscured emission. Our analysis focuses on one ERQ, J0834, because its distinct spectroscopic features allow the emission to be easily decomposed into separate kinematic components.

AI.tldr: 利用JWST ERS Q3D数据分析了极端红类星体(ERQ)中心核的光谱，揭示了复杂运动学结构和尘埃遮挡的性质。UV线以散射光为主，而光学发射线则结合了散射和遮挡发射。重点分析ERQ J0834，其独特光谱特征便于分解不同运动学成分。
AI.motivation: 理解极端红类星体(ERQ)中心核的气体运动学结构和尘埃遮挡特性，揭示其物理性质和能量来源。
AI.method: 使用JWST ERS Q3D数据，通过光谱建模分解rest-frame光学发射线中的不同运动学成分；结合档案数据分析SED；对比UV线和光学发射线的运动学与光散射特性。
AI.result: ERQ的SED与显著尘埃遮挡的中心源一致，仅有少量相对未遮挡的UV/光学通量沿视线散射。UV线主要由散射光主导，光学发射线比率显示散射与遮挡发射的组合。J0834因其光谱特征可清晰分解运动学成分。
AI.conclusion: ERQ内部存在速度-密度分层的气体结构，尺度跨越多个量级。UV与光学发射线的运动学基本一致，但辐射机制不同。J0834可作为研究ERQ内部结构的理想目标。

recommendation.reason: 论文主题为极端红类星体（ERQ）的中心核运动学与尘埃遮挡，与用户Zotero画像中的'强引力透镜'、'高红移星系动力学'等核心兴趣不直接相关。虽然涉及'尘埃'和'JWST'关键词，但缺乏引力透镜、高红移星系动力学或核心作者的重叠。规则评分已反映泛关键词的有限匹配。
recommendation.topic_fit: 低。论文聚焦于ERQ的核区气体运动学和尘埃性质，而非用户核心的强引力透镜或高红移星系动力学。
recommendation.method_fit: 低。方法为光谱分解和SED拟合，与用户常用的引力透镜建模或高红移积分场光谱分析不直接相关。
recommendation.author_fit: 无。作者列表中无用户Zotero中的核心作者。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 中。利用JWST数据揭示ERQ的分层运动学结构有一定新颖性，但未涉及用户优先关注的透镜或高红移星系动力学。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文主题偏离用户核心兴趣领域（强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学），且缺乏核心作者或方法的重叠。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们分析了作为JWST ERS Q3D项目一部分观测到的极红类星体（ERQs）中心核的光谱。我们重点关注突出的静止系光学发射线的复杂运动学结构。我们的建模使我们能够分解这些谱线，并将发射分离成不同的运动学成分，这些成分暗示了ERQ内部在多个物理尺度上存在速度和密度分层的气体结构。通过将JWST数据与档案数据相结合，我们分析了ERQ的光谱能量分布（SEDs），发现它们与一个显著被尘埃遮蔽的中心源一致，该中心源有少量相对未被遮蔽的紫外/光学通量散射到我们的视线中。虽然紫外和光学发射线的运动学基本一致，但紫外谱线主要由散射光主导。相比之下，光学发射线比表明散射和遮蔽发射的结合。我们的分析聚焦于一个ERQ，J0834，因为它独特的光谱特征使得发射可以轻松分解为不同的运动学成分。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，ERQ内部存在速度-密度分层的气体结构，尺度跨越多个量级。UV与光学发射线的运动学基本一致，但辐射机制不同。J0834可作为研究ERQ内部结构的理想目标。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Physical parameters and data availability of ERQ sample
figures.caption_zh: 表1：ERQ样本的物理参数和数据可用性

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: JWST NIRSpec spectra of the ERQs. Prominent emission lines are labeled. The gap in the spectra is due to the gap between the NRS1 and NRS2 channels. For analysis of spectral lines, we subtract out the continuum model shown by the dotted lines.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：ERQ的JWST NIRSpec光谱。突出的发射线已标注。光谱中的间隙是由于NRS1和NRS2通道之间的间隙造成的。对于谱线分析，我们减去了由虚线显示的连续谱模型。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Modeled templates for J0834
figures.caption_zh: 表2：J0834的建模模板

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Observed and modeled spectral profiles for the J0834 H \(\beta\) + [O 3 ] ( left ) and H \(\alpha\) emission ( right ) along with residuals ( bottom ). The colors correspond to the four templates from Tab. 2 .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：J0834的H \(\beta\) + [O 3 ]（左）和H \(\alpha\) 发射（右）的观测和建模光谱轮廓，以及残差（底部）。颜色对应表2中的四个模板。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Left: The H \(\beta\) and [O 3 ] emission profiles associated with Templates 0834-A and -C (cyan) and 0834-B and -D (orange). The two profiles are constructed by subtracting the other templates from the total emission (see Sec. 3.2 ). Center: Same as the previous panel, but for the H \(\alpha\) and [N 2 ] emission profiles. Right: The H \(\alpha\) and [O 3 ] profiles of Templates 0834-A and -C. In addition to showing the [O 3 ] doublet associated with Templates 0834-A and -C, we further highlight the distinct kinematics of the [O 3 ] \(\lambda\) 5007 by subtracting the modeled emission of [O 3 ] \(\lambda\) 4959.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：左：与模板0834-A和-C（青色）以及0834-B和-D（橙色）相关的H \(\beta\) 和[O 3 ]发射轮廓。这两个轮廓是通过从总发射中减去其他模板构建的（见第3.2节）。中：与左图相同，但针对H \(\alpha\) 和[N 2 ]发射轮廓。右：模板0834-A和-C的H \(\alpha\) 和[O 3 ]轮廓。除了显示与模板0834-A和-C相关的[O 3 ]双线外，我们通过减去[O 3 ] \(\lambda\) 4959的建模发射进一步突出了[O 3 ] \(\lambda\) 5007的独特运动学。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Red optical and NIR spectrum of J0834. We use the widths and offsets of Templates 0834-A, 0834-B, and 0834-C to fit the emission profiles of He 1 \(\lambda\) 5876, [O 1 ] \(\lambda\lambda\) 6300,64, O 1 \(\lambda\) 8446, as well as a group of miscellaneous identified lines: He 1 \(\lambda\) 7065, [Ar 3 ] \(\lambda\) 7136, [O 2 ] \(\lambda\lambda\) 7320,31, and [Ni 2 ] \(\lambda\) 7378 (the identification of the [N 2 ] line is uncertain). We highlight the lack of detected O 1 \(\lambda\) 7774 emission. The colors are the same as in Fig. 2 .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：J0834的红色光学和近红外光谱。我们使用模板0834-A、0834-B和0834-C的宽度和偏移来拟合He 1 \(\lambda\) 5876、[O 1 ] \(\lambda\lambda\) 6300,64、O 1 \(\lambda\) 8446以及一组已识别的杂散谱线：He 1 \(\lambda\) 7065、[Ar 3 ] \(\lambda\) 7136、[O 2 ] \(\lambda\lambda\) 7320,31和[Ni 2 ] \(\lambda\) 7378（[N 2 ]谱线的识别不确定）的发射轮廓。我们强调了未检测到O 1 \(\lambda\) 7774发射。颜色与图2相同。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Top: Velocity profiles of the O 1 \(\lambda\) 8446 line from the JWST spectrum and the O 1 \(\lambda\) 1304 line from the SDSS and X-Shooter spectra. The JWST spectrum is scaled to match the flux of the UV spectra with an observed O 1 \(\lambda\) 1304: \(\lambda\) 8446 flux ratio of 1:3–5, depending on the scaling used. We also include the template fits to the O 1 \(\lambda\) 8446 profile that are also shown in Fig. 4 . Bottom: Velocity profiles of the C 4 \(\lambda\lambda\) 1548,51 line from the X-Shooter and SDSS spectra and the H \(\alpha\) line from the JWST spectrum. We include fits to the C 4 line using the offsets and widths of templates 0834-A, -B, and -C. In both panels, the SDSS and X-Shooter spectra are smoothed by Gaussian kernels with FWHMs of 1 Å to aid in visual comparisons.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：顶部：来自JWST光谱的O 1 \(\lambda\) 8446谱线和来自SDSS和X-Shooter光谱的O 1 \(\lambda\) 1304谱线的速度轮廓。JWST光谱被缩放以匹配紫外光谱的通量，观测到的O 1 \(\lambda\) 1304: \(\lambda\) 8446通量比为1:3–5，具体取决于所使用的缩放比例。我们还包含了图4中所示的O 1 \(\lambda\) 8446轮廓的模板拟合。底部：来自X-Shooter和SDSS光谱的C 4 \(\lambda\lambda\) 1548,51谱线和来自JWST光谱的H \(\alpha\) 谱线的速度轮廓。我们使用模板0834-A、-B和-C的偏移和宽度对C 4谱线进行了拟合。在两个面板中，SDSS和X-Shooter光谱均通过半高全宽为1 Å的高斯核进行平滑，以辅助视觉比较。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Kinematic profiles of Fe 2 \(\lambda\) 5169 compared to O 1 \(\lambda\) 8446 and H \(\beta\) . The profiles largely agree with each other, albeit the peaks of the Fe 2 emission are slightly offset from the other two lines. This is strong evidence for two Fe 2 kinematic components – one linked to Template 0834-A and one from -B.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：Fe 2 \(\lambda\) 5169与O 1 \(\lambda\) 8446和H \(\beta\) 的运动学轮廓。这些轮廓大致一致，尽管Fe 2发射的峰值与其他两条谱线略有偏移。这是两个Fe 2运动学成分的有力证据——一个与模板0834-A相关，另一个与模板0834-B相关。

title: Primordial Magnetic Fields at Cosmic Dawn: 21-cm Forecasts with HERA and SKA
summary: Primordial magnetic fields (PMFs) can enhance the abundance of low-mass halos during Cosmic Dawn by sourcing additional small-scale matter fluctuations. This enhanced small-scale power can accelerate early galaxy formation, shifting the timing of Lyman-$α$ coupling, X-ray heating, and reionization toward earlier times and imprinting correlated signatures on the global and fluctuating 21-cm signals. We extend the fast analytic framework {\tt\string zeus21} to include a physically motivated PMF contribution to the linear matter power spectrum, including radiative damping before recombination and magnetic-pressure suppression below the magnetic Jeans scale. The implementation preserves the speed and modularity of {\tt\string zeus21}, enabling efficient exploration of PMF parameter space. For $n_B=-2.9$, we quantify the impact of PMFs on early structure formation and 21-cm observables across a range of fiducial magnetic amplitudes, and forecast detectability with \textit{HERA} and \textit{SKA}. Combining 21-cm forecasts with external CMB priors, we find that upcoming experiments can probe PMFs through their impact on small-scale structure, providing constraints complementary to existing cosmological probes.

AI.tldr: 本文在快速分析框架zeus21中加入了原初磁场的物理贡献，研究了PMF对早期结构形成和21-cm信号的影响，并评估了HERA和SKA对其的探测能力。
AI.motivation: 原初磁场可以增强小尺度物质涨落，加速早期星系形成，从而影响宇宙黎明时期的21-cm信号，但目前缺乏快速且物理自洽的分析工具来量化这种影响。
AI.method: 在zeus21框架中引入PMF对线性物质功率谱的贡献，包括辐射阻尼和磁金斯尺度下的磁压抑制，保持框架的高速和模块化特性。
AI.result: 量化了对于n_B=-2.9不同磁振幅下PMF对早期结构形成和21-cm可观测量的影响，结合CMB先验预测了HERA和SKA的探测能力。
AI.conclusion: 未来21-cm实验能够通过PMF对小尺度结构的影响来约束原初磁场，提供与现有宇宙学探测互补的约束。

recommendation.reason: 该论文主要研究原初磁场对21-cm信号的影响，属于宇宙学再电离和早期结构形成领域。用户的核心兴趣是强引力透镜，特别是星系-星系强透镜、高红移星系动力学和运动学。虽然用户画像中出现了'magnetic'关键词，但权重较低且非核心。论文不涉及引力透镜、高红移星系动力学或用户核心作者群，与用户主要研究领域关联度极低。
recommendation.topic_fit: 低。论文主题为原初磁场和21-cm宇宙学，与用户核心的强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学等主题不匹配。
recommendation.method_fit: 低。论文使用半解析框架zeus21模拟21-cm信号，不涉及引力透镜建模或高红移星系观测分析。
recommendation.author_fit: 无。论文作者不在用户核心作者列表中。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 低。论文的创新点在于将PMF加入21-cm模拟，但用户领域不直接相关。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文主题偏离用户核心研究领域（强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学），且不涉及用户关注的高红移星系气体、尘埃或运动学观测。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 原初磁场（PMF）可以通过引发额外的小尺度物质涨落，增强宇宙黎明期间低质量晕的丰度。这种增强的小尺度功率可以加速早期星系形成，将莱曼-α耦合、X射线加热和再电离的时间提前，并在整体和涨落的21厘米信号上留下相关特征。我们将快速解析框架{\tt\string zeus21}扩展，纳入一个物理动机明确的PMF对线性物质功率谱的贡献，包括复合前的辐射阻尼和磁金斯尺度以下的磁压抑制。该实现保留了{\tt\string zeus21}的速度和模块化特性，使得能够高效探索PMF参数空间。对于$n_B=-2.9$，我们量化了PMF在一系列基准磁振幅下对早期结构形成和21厘米可观测量的影响，并预测了使用\textit{HERA}和\textit{SKA}的可探测性。将21厘米预测与外部CMB先验相结合，我们发现即将开展的实验可以通过PMF对小尺度结构的影响来探测PMF，提供与现有宇宙学探测互补的约束。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，未来21厘米实验能够通过PMF对小尺度结构的影响来约束原初磁场，提供与现有宇宙学探测互补的约束。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Matter power spectrum (left) and Sheth–Tormen halo mass function ratio relative to \(\Lambda\) CDM, \({HMF}(M_{h})/{HMF}_{\Lambda{CDM}}(M_{h})\) (right), at redshift \(z=20\) for several primordial magnetic-field (PMF) amplitudes. Increasing PMF strength enhances small-scale power through Lorentz force–sourced perturbations, generating the characteristic high- \(k\) bump and damping cutoff in \(P_{m}(k)\) . This extra small-scale power boosts the abundance of low-mass halos, producing order-unity to order-of-magnitude enhancements in the halo mass function at \(M_{h}\sim 10^{5}\) – \(10^{8}\,M_{\odot}\) , while the ratio approaches unity at high masses where PMF effects are negligible. Although the low-mass HMF can increase strongly, the net SFRD response is more moderate because the star-formation efficiency declines toward low halo masses and the PMF contribution is damped at very high \(k\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：在红移\(z=20\)处，针对几种原初磁场（PMF）振幅的物质功率谱（左图）和相对于\(\Lambda\) CDM的Sheth–Tormen晕质量函数比值\({HMF}(M_{h})/{HMF}_{\Lambda{CDM}}(M_{h})\)（右图）。增加PMF强度通过洛伦兹力引发的扰动增强小尺度功率，在\(P_{m}(k)\)中产生特征性的高\(k\)凸起和阻尼截止。这种额外的小尺度功率提升了低质量晕的丰度，在\(M_{h}\sim 10^{5}\) – \(10^{8}\,M_{\odot}\)范围内使晕质量函数产生量级为1到数量级的增强，而在PMF效应可忽略的高质量端，比值趋近于1。尽管低质量HMF可以显著增加，但由于恒星形成效率随晕质量降低而下降，且PMF贡献在极高\(k\)处被阻尼，净SFRD响应更为温和。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Global and fluctuating 21-cm observables for varying PMF amplitude \(\sigma_{B,0}\) at fixed \(n_{B}=-2.9\) (all other parameters held at their fiducial values). Left: sky-averaged brightness temperature \(T_{21}(z)\) . Right: reduced 21-cm power spectrum \(\Delta^{2}_{21}(k,z)\) evaluated at \(k=0.30\,\,{Mpc}^{-1}\) . Increasing \(\sigma_{B,0}\) produces clear, correlated shifts in both the timing and amplitude of the global signal and power-spectrum evolution.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：在固定\(n_{B}=-2.9\)（所有其他参数保持基准值）下，不同PMF振幅\(\sigma_{B,0}\)的整体和涨落21厘米可观测量。左图：天空平均亮温度\(T_{21}(z)\)。右图：在\(k=0.30\,\,{Mpc}^{-1}\)处评估的约化21厘米功率谱\(\Delta^{2}_{21}(k,z)\)。增加\(\sigma_{B,0}\)会在整体信号和功率谱演化的时间及振幅上产生清晰的相关偏移。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Marginalized Fisher constraints for HERA at fiducial \(\sigma_{B,0}=0.06\,{nG}\) (fixed \(n_{B}=-2.9\) ), using the 21-cm + CMB prior configuration (Planck 2018 prior set). This figure shows the long 6570-hour campaign only. In each 2D panel, shaded regions denote the marginalized 68% (dark green) and 95% (light green) confidence regions; the dark green line marks the 68% boundary. Diagonal panels show the corresponding 1D marginalized posteriors. As expected with external CMB priors, the cosmological block \((h,\omega_{b},\omega_{c},A_{s})\) is strongly compressed, while the dominant remaining covariance lies in the astrophysical/PMF sector \((\log_{10}L_{X},\log_{10}\epsilon_{\star},\log_{10}f_{{esc},10},A_{LW},A_{vcb},\sigma_{B,0})\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：在基准\(\sigma_{B,0}=0.06\,{nG}\)（固定\(n_{B}=-2.9\)）下，使用21厘米+CMB先验配置（Planck 2018先验集）的HERA边际化Fisher约束。此图仅显示6570小时的长观测活动。在每个二维面板中，阴影区域表示边际化的68%（深绿色）和95%（浅绿色）置信区域；深绿色线标记68%边界。对角线面板显示相应的一维边际化后验。如预期，在外部CMB先验下，宇宙学块\((h,\omega_{b},\omega_{c},A_{s})\)被强烈压缩，而主要的剩余协方差位于天体物理/PMF扇区\((\log_{10}L_{X},\log_{10}\epsilon_{\star},\log_{10}f_{{esc},10},A_{LW},A_{vcb},\sigma_{B,0})\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Same setup as Fig. 3 , but for the HERA short campaign (730 h) with 21-cm + CMB priors at fiducial \(\sigma_{B,0}=0.06\,{nG}\) and fixed \(n_{B}=-2.9\) . Relative to the long run, the contours broaden, with the largest degradation in the astrophysical/PMF sector.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：与图3相同的设置，但针对HERA短观测活动（730小时），使用21厘米+CMB先验，基准\(\sigma_{B,0}=0.06\,{nG}\)和固定\(n_{B}=-2.9\)。与长观测相比，轮廓变宽，天体物理/PMF扇区的退化最大。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: One-dimensional marginalized constraints on the PMF amplitude \(\sigma_{B,0}\) for fiducial \(\sigma_{B,0}=0.06\,{nG}\) (vertical dotted line), comparing HERA and SKA with (dashed) and without (solid) CMB priors. The left panel shows the short observing campaign; the right panel shows the long campaign. In both instruments, adding CMB priors narrows the posterior, with the strongest relative effect for HERA in the long campaign where cosmological degeneracies are most efficiently broken. SKA improves over HERA in the short-campaign regime, while in the long-campaign regime the two experiments become comparable once cosmological information is included, indicating that the remaining uncertainty is increasingly set by shared PMF–astrophysical degeneracy structure rather than raw sensitivity alone.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：在基准\(\sigma_{B,0}=0.06\,{nG}\)（垂直虚线）下，PMF振幅\(\sigma_{B,0}\)的一维边际化约束，比较HERA和SKA在有（虚线）和无（实线）CMB先验的情况。左图显示短观测活动；右图显示长观测活动。在两种仪器中，加入CMB先验使后验变窄，对HERA在长观测活动中的相对效果最强，此时宇宙学简并最有效地被打破。在短观测活动情况下，SKA优于HERA，而在长观测活动情况下，一旦包含宇宙学信息，两个实验变得可比，表明剩余不确定性越来越多地由共享的PMF-天体物理简并结构而非原始灵敏度决定。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Random-forest prediction of the PMF amplitude \(\sigma_{B,0}\) from noiseless zeus21 outputs, with each point corresponding to one run. Top panels show predicted versus true \(\sigma_{B,0}\) for a 2-feature model (left), using \((T_{21}(z{=}25),\,x_{e}(z{=}30))\) , and a 4-feature model (right), which additionally includes \((A_{LW},A_{vcb})\) . The dashed line marks the 1:1 relation. Bottom panels show residuals \((\sigma_{B,0}^{true}-\sigma_{B,0}^{pred})\) versus true \(\sigma_{B,0}\) , with binned median trends overlaid. The visible clustering at specific \(\sigma_{B,0}\) values reflects the discrete sampling of our zeus21 grid and is not a physical feature. Adding \((A_{LW},A_{vcb})\) is associated with improved test-set performance (2-feature: \(R^{2}=0.9679\) , \({RMSE}=5.8\times 10^{-3}\,{nG}\) ; 4-feature: \(R^{2}=0.9942\) , \({RMSE}=2.4\times 10^{-3}\,{nG}\) ) and reduced residual structure, indicating improved capture of PMF–astrophysical degeneracy directions. We use this RF model only as an alternative diagnostic, with all primary constraints in this work coming from the Fisher analysis.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：从无噪声zeus21输出中随机森林预测PMF振幅\(\sigma_{B,0}\)，每个点对应一次运行。上方面板显示2特征模型（左图）和4特征模型（右图）的预测值与真实\(\sigma_{B,0}\)对比，2特征模型使用\((T_{21}(z{=}25),\,x_{e}(z{=}30))\)，4特征模型额外包含\((A_{LW},A_{vcb})\)。虚线标记1:1关系。下方面板显示残差\((\sigma_{B,0}^{true}-\sigma_{B,0}^{pred})\)与真实\(\sigma_{B,0}\)的关系，并叠加了分箱中位数趋势。在特定\(\sigma_{B,0}\)值处的可见聚类反映了我们zeus21网格的离散采样，并非物理特征。加入\((A_{LW},A_{vcb})\)与改进的测试集性能相关（2特征：\(R^{2}=0.9679\)，\({RMSE}=5.8\times 10^{-3}\,{nG}\)；4特征：\(R^{2}=0.9942\)，\({RMSE}=2.4\times 10^{-3}\,{nG}\)）并减少了残差结构，表明更好地捕捉了PMF-天体物理简并方向。我们仅将此RF模型用作替代诊断工具，本工作中的所有主要约束均来自Fisher分析。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Marginalized \(1\sigma\) constraints at \(\sigma_{B,0}^{fid}=0.06\,{nG}\) for the 21-cm-only Fisher analysis. Columns list forecasted uncertainties for HERA and SKA at matched short (730h) and long (6570h) exposures. The final column gives the long-exposure ratio \(\sigma_{HERA}/\sigma_{SKA}\) at 6570h; values \(>1\) indicate stronger SKA constraints, while values \(<1\) indicate tighter HERA constraints.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：在\(\sigma_{B,0}^{fid}=0.06\,{nG}\)下，仅使用21厘米的Fisher分析的边际化\(1\sigma\)约束。列中列出了HERA和SKA在匹配的短（730小时）和长（6570小时）曝光下的预测不确定性。最后一列给出6570小时下的长曝光比值\(\sigma_{HERA}/\sigma_{SKA}\)；值\(>1\)表示SKA约束更强，而值\(<1\)表示HERA约束更紧。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Same as Table 1 , but including external CMB priors in the Fisher matrix.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：与表1相同，但在Fisher矩阵中包含了外部CMB先验。
